message:
refactor(tests): replace unwrap with expect/unreachable across 8 modules

Continue the unwrap-removal pass for remaining test suites:
transport_fault_gate, bpet_migration_gate, dgis_migration_gate,
guardrail_monitor, time_travel_engine, frankensqlite_adapter,
models, and transparent_reports. Use unreachable!() instead of
panic!() for impossible match arms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
